com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors

Class ActionRunner

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Visitor.Base
      • com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors.ActionRunner
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Action.Visitor

    public class ActionRunner
extends Action.Visitor.Base
implements Action.Visitor
    A simple visitor that invokes actions. Typically, an instance of this class will be applied to a given action in a following manner. action.accept(new ActionRunner());

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Visitor

        Action.Visitor.Base

      • toTask

        protected Runnable toTask(Action action)
        An extension point to allow users to customize how an action will be executed by this Visitor.
        Parameters:
        action - An action executed by a runnable object returned by this method.
